title: BundleGUI
description: Open bundles with a right-click and manage their contents using a clean inventory-style GUI. Variant-aware, lightweight, and fully vanilla-friendly.
body:
# **BundleGui – Enhanced Bundle Management**

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

**BundleGui** elevates Minecraft’s bundle experience with a polished, intuitive interface designed for quick visual management.

![bundle-gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0accf9f4adacefb63adec76326065f7098cbf9.png)

Features

- **Right-Click Access**: Open a bundle directly with a right-click.
- **Variant-Aware UI**: Automatically displays the correct textures for leather, white, light gray, and future bundle variants.
- **Intuitive Inventory Grid**: Browse and rearrange bundle contents at a glance—no more guessing what’s inside.
- **Tooltip Support**: Native Minecraft hover tooltips keep item details at your fingertips.
